message:
feat: add bootstrap migration self-healing and VOI scan scheduler

Bootstrap migration (cli/bootstrap.rs):
- Implement MigrationReason enum with 14 variants covering BinaryNotOnPath,
  StalePathEntry, DuplicatePathEntries, SystemdUnitStaleBinary,
  DeprecatedConfigKey, MissingStateFile, EmptyBallastPool, InterruptedInstall,
  and more
- Each migration is logged with a reason code and reversible via timestamped
  backups for safe rollback

VOI scan scheduler (monitor/voi_scheduler.rs):
- Implement Value-of-Information scan budget allocator that prioritizes paths
  with highest expected reclaimed-bytes-per-IO
- Utility model: expected_reclaim_bytes * uncertainty_discount - io_cost_penalty
  - fp_risk_penalty + exploration_bonus
- Fallback guarantee: reverts to deterministic round-robin if forecast accuracy
  degrades below threshold for N consecutive windows
- Configurable via VoiConfig with scan_budget_per_interval,
  exploration_quota_fraction, io_cost_weight, fp_risk_weight knobs

Module wiring:
- Register bootstrap and voi_scheduler submodules in cli/mod.rs and monitor/mod.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
